channel.title: LIBRCHAIN 区块链新闻雷达
channel.description: 每小时自动更新的区块链新闻、博客与 X 热点聚合

item.title: Here's what 'cracking' bitcoin in 9 minutes by quantum computers actually means
item.description: Google's quantum paper made headlines with that number. Here's what it means, what's actually at risk, and why 6.9 million bitcoin are more exposed than the rest.

item.title: "The grand unification of AI and crypto is about to happen." — Marc Andreessen "It's now obvious that AI agents are going to need money—it's already happening." "It's that William Gibson quote: the future is already here, it just isn't distributed yet." "My friends - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiWEFVX3lxTE5BMTZTZTcxRjNRYlZNcTNsZEtYSFZ6U19kQnF3VldBZXdSb1drU1pKbHRrVGdhZTZXZjFqQ3BEY2RJcHRJbGx1SDREX29oMnJMUERwenVPM20?oc=5" target="_blank">"The grand unification of AI and crypto is abou…

item.title: Ethereum Foundation nearly reaches 70,000 staked ETH goal
item.description: The non-profit foundation has staked 69,500 ETH, nearly reaching the goal it unveiled at the end of February, less than two months ago.

item.title: Charles Schwab Is Gearing Up to Offer Bitcoin, Ethereum Spot Trading
item.description: Financial giant Charles Schwab is set to launch spot buying of Bitcoin and Ethereum by the end of the quarter, the firm said Friday.

item.title: FIFA Inks World Cup Prediction Market Deal With ADI Predictstreet
item.description: The FIFA World Cup will feature a prediction market platform built on ADI Chain, with the network’s token hitting a new high Friday.

item.title: Cambodian lawmakers propose severe prison time for crypto scammers
item.description: The draft bill, yet to be signed into law by the king, marked a significant policy change for Cambodia officials in addressing scam centers.

item.title: Schwab plans spot bitcoin, ether trading launch in first half of 2026
item.description: The financial services giant with almost $12 trillion in client assets is moving closer to direct crypto trading, offering subscription for early access to the Schwab Crypto account.

item.title: Is Bitcoin mispricing a prolonged Iran war? Ex-hedge fund manager weighs in
item.description: In a recent Cointelegraph interview, macro investor James Lavish explains why markets are pricing in a quick end to the Iran war — and what could happen if that assumption is wrong.

item.title: Circle under fire after $285 million Drift hack over inaction to freeze stolen USDC
item.description: Prominent blockchain sleuth ZachXBT alleged faster action by Circle could have limited crypto losses, but freezing asset without legal authorization carries legal risks.

item.title: Bitcoin Miner MARA Slashes 15% of Workforce After Selling $1.1 Billion in BTC
item.description: Publicly traded Bitcoin miner MARA cut 15% of its staff this week after selling $1.1 billion in Bitcoin to fuel an AI push.

item.title: Myriad Traders Predict US Boots in Iran After Downed Fighter Jet Prompts Rescue Mission
item.description: President Trump insisted that the Strait of Hormuz could easily be reopened "with a little more time."

item.title: US community banks oppose OCC's approval of Coinbase trust charter
item.description: The Independent Community Bankers of America warns Coinbase’s trust charter falls short of regulatory standards and could pose risks to consumers and the financial system.

item.title: JUST IN: Michael Saylor say it's a "Good Friday to buy Bitcoin." - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiYkFVX3lxTFBMZXdQVXc3eWFyNWQ1TmIxQVQ4OGh6YllDMy1mM1RlRk1jbEFmbGdSeG5GdzhoVUVKNFdEUWRrUThCd0hyWmVLckMyQkJoMUNJd3AyN2swTVdPY0tzOGlhLXRn?oc=5" target="_blank">JUST IN: Michael Saylor say it's a…

item.title: Block is bringing back the #Bitcoin faucet. 🟠 Launched by Gavin Andresen in 2010, it originally gave away 5 $BTC per person, worth $500,000 today. The website currently shows a countdown to April 6. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiYkFVX3lxTE1IMjBERGVPbk9lYkZ0cjhxOXdFeE1QZEZNUVpMZFV2ZkQ2U2hLNmJqTTgwNVpQbGVybnpvX3FOX2VUMzJEM2pNekljRFVBbkxkNUx4N3E5Ml9QWHdyWXpmcVJ3?oc=5" target="_blank">Block is bringing back the #Bitcoi…

item.title: Decentralized Email Service Dmail to Shut Down, Token Hits New Low
item.description: Dmail’s team said it struggled with infrastructure costs and failed monetization attempts despite five years of development.

item.title: JUST IN: $12 trillion Charles Schwab is launching its crypto vertical allowing users to buy Bitcoin "soon" 🚀 - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZ0FVX3lxTE5HSUc4ZWVQa2NJcmItcF92TFJvaVpZNGNURDBDc1A1ZldIaFc1RzBZTzgzb1ZUVlNWNzFqbVVha3R0dkpHTThnTkdqRWhHeldMUDd2TkpnSm1abUdrczlkRWN6YTlkN3c?oc=5" target="_blank">JUST IN: $12 trillion Charl…

item.title: Kalshi onboards ex-Democratic strategist amid legal troubles
item.description: Stephanie Cutter will join the prediction markets company as a policy adviser, having previously worked in Democratic lawmakers’ campaigns.

item.title: ZachXBT accuses Circle of $420M in 'compliance failures' since 2022
item.description: Circle had several hours or days to freeze illicit USDC funds in many of the 15 cases presented, but failed to act, according to ZachXBT.

item.title: Trump’s New Attorney General Held Bitcoin—But Has a Mixed Crypto Track Record
item.description: Acting Attorney General Todd Blanche directed his staff last year to lay off crypto developers—but also oversaw their continued prosecution.

item.title: 'We Are Ready to Speak': Drift Beckons North Korea-Linked Hackers Following $285M Exploit
item.description: The Solana-based project reached out to wallets holding stolen funds on Ethereum.

item.title: What Is Q-Day? The Quantum Threat to Bitcoin Explained
item.description: Experts warn quantum computers could someday forge Bitcoin’s digital signatures, allowing unauthorized transactions.

item.title: What next as XRP rises to $1.33 but fails to break out
item.description: Price tracks broader crypto flows, with range-bound structure intact until $1.35 breaks.

item.title: Where Next for Bitcoin After Worst Quarter Since 2018?
item.description: Bitcoin shed 22% in Q1 2026 as war, tariffs, and a hawkish Fed crushed risk appetite, but late-quarter data hints the worst may have passed.

item.title: Crypto Biz: Bitcoin treasuries break ranks as BTC dips below $70K
item.description: Corporate Bitcoin holders split as Strategy holds firm while Nakamoto sells at a loss, exposing risks of debt-driven accumulation and a shifting treasury model under pressure.

item.title: Execution risk in crypto is the new custody risk
item.description: Execution risk in crypto is the new custody risk. Live credentials, not just private keys, are now the main attack surface.

item.title: Bitcoin Miner Riot Platforms Sells Over $250 Million Worth of BTC
item.description: Publicly traded Bitcoin miner Riot Platforms sold another $250 million worth of BTC as it strategically pivots into AI.

item.title: Price predictions 4/3: BTC, ETH, BNB, XRP, SOL, DOGE, HYPE, ADA, BCH, LINK
item.description: Bitcoin is attempting to form a bottom, but select analysts believe that the decline is not over yet and the $60,000 level may break down.

item.title: Ethereum Foundation Stakes $93M Worth of ETH, Nears Strategic Target
item.description: The deposits bring the Foundation close to its strategic staking target of 70,000 ETH, bolstering Ethereum’s proof-of-stake infrastructure.

item.title: Binance led Q1 crypto derivatives as Hyperliquid cracked top 10: CoinGlass
item.description: Binance led derivatives trading in Q1 2026 with about $4.9 trillion in volume, while Hyperliquid entered the top 10 as perp DEXs continued to gain traction, according to CoinGlass.

item.title: Ethereum L2s need responsive pricing to scale, says Offchain Labs
item.description: Edward Felten said Ethereum L2s need responsive pricing to scale, as Arbitrum’s new model tests an alternative to EIP-1559-style fee swings.

item.title: Solo Bitcoin miner bags $210K Bitcoin block reward
item.description: A CKPool-connected solo miner just landed a $210,000 Bitcoin block reward, one of only 20 solo‑mined blocks in the past year, as listed miners sell BTC to stay afloat.

item.title: Here’s what happened in crypto today
item.description: Need to know what happened in crypto today? Here is the latest news on daily trends and events impacting Bitcoin price, blockchain, DeFi, NFTs, Web3 and crypto regulation.

item.title: CoinDesk 20 performance update: Bitcoin (BTC) trades flat while altcoins rise
item.description: NEAR Protocol (NEAR) gained 5.8% and Avalanche (AVAX) climbed 3.6%.

item.title: Decentralized email platform Dmail to cease services on May 15
item.description: Dmail Network will shut down on May 15 after citing high infrastructure costs, failed fundraising and weak token utility.

item.title: NEW: Ark Invest CEO Cathie Wood says on CNBC that Bitcoin's usual -85% collapses are "DONE" 👀 "This is a prove technology, it's a proven monetary system, and it's a new asset class." 🚀 - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZ0FVX3lxTE1tS0VUZTRtMGpIUGdON0liSTVoanRZSklEMHlHRUxpRFFFWmZ4NlI5TkN1Z0ZocHdyR2V3VlZEQU8waGFFSHpOTTE0ZXYxRjlxQ3lGZE5XMTRuOXQ2WEEzcDVsSmxXRjA?oc=5" target="_blank">NEW: Ark Invest CEO Cathie …

item.title: Centralizing crypto: Why Malta’s clash with ESMA is about more than one small state
item.description: A plan to move supervision of major crypto asset service providers to the France-based ESMA is testing MiCA’s balance between EU-level control and national-level decision-making.

item.title: U.S. March jobs smash expectations, with 178,000 added
item.description: Bitcoin continued to trade near the $67,000 level just following the strong report.

item.title: Cambodia Advances Law Targeting Crypto Scam Compound Kingpins with Life in Jail
item.description: The draft law would impose prison terms of up to life for those running the scam compounds behind billions of dollars in crypto fraud.

item.title: Aave avoided bad debt by shifting risk to borrowers: Bank of Canada study
item.description: A Bank of Canada staff paper found Aave V3 avoided bad debt in 2024, but said the model pushed losses onto borrowers during liquidations.

item.title: Ethereum Foundation stakes another $93 million ether, reaching its 70,000 ETH target
item.description: The foundation deposited the bulk of its planned staking commitment in a single session, completing a program announced in February to turn dormant treasury holdings into a yield-generating position.

item.title: Algorand Soars Double-Digits On Google ‘Post-Quantum Protocols’ Citation
item.description: Algorand jumped following its mention in a Google research paper, as post-quantum cryptography emerges as a new crypto narrative.

item.title: Bitcoin 'done' with 85% crashes, says Cathie Wood amid new $34K target
item.description: ARK Invest CEO Cathie Wood said that Bitcoin as a "proven" asset would no longer experience drawdowns of 85% or more from all-time highs.

item.title: Crypto snoozes into Good Friday as oil and macro stir: Crypto Daybook Americas
item.description: Your day-ahead look for April 3, 2026

item.title: The First Bitcoin Cat Community on X - 34 Members - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiW0FVX3lxTE5HR0ZzRnI5OGpEM1dHU0J4QXh4X24tR2hDQmZ2aTlnTUhoWTZUSHhnMkx2eW1BLXZMZU9BVkoyWDM4TUVPMGNOY0FwS1hJTXhLSFkwbEpRenhYZnc?oc=5" target="_blank">The First Bitcoin Cat Community on X - 34 M…

item.title: Crypto consolidates as volatility cools and futures markets tilt bearish
item.description: Bitcoin holds a tight range as altcoins rally on low liquidity, but derivatives data and options skew suggest traders are bracing for downside.

item.title: Drift sends onchain message to wallets tied to $280M exploit
item.description: Drift Protocol initiated onchain contact with wallets tied to the $280 million exploit as an unknown sender also attempts to pressure the attacker.

item.title: Polymarket Inks US, Canada Deal with European Soccer League LaLiga
item.description: The multi-year partnership covers the US and Canada, marking Polymarket's continued expansion into traditional sports markets.

item.title: Naoris Protocol's quantum-resistant blockchain goes live as Bitcoin and Ethereum face 'Q-Day' threats
item.description: Naoris debuts its quantum-resistant mainnet, which uses algorithms approved by the U.S. National Institute of Standards and Technology.

item.title: South Korean brokerage Korea Investment & Securities eyes Coinone stake: Report
item.description: The reported acquisition talks come as South Korea is considering a 20% cap on major crypto exchange shareholders, which would force major platforms to restructure ownership.

item.title: THE ETHEREUM FOUNDATION JUST STAKED $46.64M ETH The Ethereum Foundation just staked another $46.64M ETH, bringing their staked total to $96.59M. The Ethereum Foundation has stopped selling ETH and has started staking ETH. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiW0FVX3lxTE5HN3RFQW5KelJUVUZiVkJ4VGltbnhpSXU4N3ZKZnZyOVZna21GU0FEd1hPczlEdThrbFhubjN3WHhpVzJ4ZENubE9QQ1ZyWkJQM1l5c3pydWsxREk?oc=5" target="_blank">THE ETHEREUM FOUNDATION JUST STAKED $46.64M…

item.title: Crypto hackers steal $169M from 34 DeFi protocols in Q1: DefiLlama
item.description: January saw the largest attack against a DeFi protocol of the quarter, the $40 million private key compromise of portfolio management platform Step Finance.

item.title: Bitcoin heads into holiday weekend exposed as ETF and CME flows go offline
item.description: Good Friday shuts CME futures and ETF activity, removing a key source of demand as large holders continue distributing and spot demand weakens.

item.title: Todd Blanche, author of DOJ crypto enforcement memo, is now interim AG
item.description: U.S. President Donald Trump named Todd Blanche, his former personal attorney and deputy attorney general, as the interim top prosecutor.

item.title: Naoris Launches Post-Quantum Blockchain as Bitcoin, Ethereum Devs Scramble to Face Threat
item.description: Naoris Protocol says its blockchain network uses quantum-resistant cryptography, as the wider crypto industry prepares for future threats.

item.title: Crypto market structure bill release pushed back as industries view revised stablecoin yield compromise this week
item.description: Crypto and banking industry representatives are viewing revised stablecoin yield compromise language this week.

item.title: USDC Stablecoin Issuer Circle Unveils New Token to Give Bitcoin More Utility
item.description: Publicly traded stablecoin issuer Circle is launching a new token, cirBTC, its own wrapped Bitcoin alternative.

item.title: Google Researchers Reveal Every Way Hackers Can Trap, Hijack AI Agents
item.description: A Google DeepMind paper maps six attack categories against autonomous AI agents—from invisible HTML commands to multi-agent flash crashes.

item.title: Bitcoin has $1.5–2 trillion in market value. "There's no way to swap a single dollar of Bitcoin into a stable coin without using a different chain or custody of some sort or KYC." @chadmasterxbt and @bc1plainview on why they built @opnetbtc — w/ @vladcostea - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiYkFVX3lxTFB1X2NSZzZFUE90a2d1bjRMeGhvazRhbVpNbmtLQUNyZERwTUMtU204cnFlMjA0Q1U5UEF5S0IxVk1OSklidnRfTTh5LV9MbTBfUTlNWFFUaDdIYlM2ZjA3RTBB?oc=5" target="_blank">Bitcoin has $1.5–2 trillion in mar…

item.title: Elon Musk's X Is Making Big Changes to Combat Crypto Scams
item.description: Will Elon Musk's X finally zap crypto scams? Here's why one exec says the changes "should kill 99% of the incentive."

item.title: Drift Protocol's $285 Million Exploit on Solana Raises Questions Over DeFi Security
item.description: A blockchain security expert compared Drift’s lapse in security to Ethereum network Ronin's $625 million loss in 2022.
